overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a dystopian urban slum area at dusk. The environment features dense neon signage, corrugated metal shacks, industrial piping, and multiple staircases connecting different levels of the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower walkway with vending machines and seating

events.description: approaching concrete staircase leading to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking along the lower industrial walkway, passing vending machines and seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: sitting on plastic chair next to the railing

entered.detail: row of illuminated blue vending machines with snack advertisements
scattered red plastic chairs along the concrete walkway
metal and concrete safety railing along the walkway edge
tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke in the distance
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow concrete walkway at the lower level of an industrial district. Blue vending machines line the left side while red plastic chairs sit on the right. In the distance, industrial smokestacks and an overhead bridge are visible against the dusk sky.

events.description: ascending concrete stairs from lower walkway to upper level
turning left into narrow passage between metal buildings

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and walking along upper walkway past corrugated metal shacks

notable_agents.action: standing near doorway of corrugated metal building

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with red metal railings leading upward
rusty corrugated metal building with wooden awning and air conditioning units
green vending machine with BURRITO XXL branding and food images
metal grate walkway surface on the upper level

segments.scene_description: Ascending concrete stairs to an upper walkway lined with corrugated metal shacks. A green Burrito XXL vending machine stands out on the right. The ground transitions to metal grating as the camera moves through this industrial upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with city skyline view

events.description: emerging from enclosed walkway to narrow passage with open city view
turning right to navigate around industrial equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow passage and turning to navigate the industrial walkway

notable_agents.action: sitting on the ground near the railing overlooking the city

entered.detail: distant view of Night City skyscrapers with dense neon signage
large floating holographic advertisement with blue and pink colors
narrow walkway made of wooden planks between buildings
machinery and satellite dishes on the rooftop area

segments.scene_description: Navigating a narrow wooden walkway between buildings with a stunning view of the Night City skyline. Neon holograms and billboards illuminate the distant towers. The path turns past industrial equipment and satellite dishes.

events.description: beginning ascent of long concrete staircase toward HOTEL sign
moving into more enclosed area with artificial neon lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing multiple flights of concrete stairs toward the upper street level

entered.detail: pink neon HOTEL sign mounted on building facade at top of stairs
large green industrial dumpster with trash bags
bank of external AC units mounted on building wall
wall with red tiles and graffiti near the staircase

segments.scene_description: Ascending a long concrete staircase through an industrial area. A pink neon HOTEL sign marks the destination at the top. The environment becomes more enclosed with red tiled walls, green dumpsters, and exposed air conditioning units.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level commercial street with neon signage

events.description: reaching top of stairs and entering upper street level with dense neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper street level past neon signs and storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: dense cluster of illuminated advertisements and store signs in Japanese and English
temporary wooden construction barrier along the sidewalk
concrete bench with items left on it
illuminated vending machine with beverage advertisements

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an upper street level lined with dense neon billboards and storefronts. The area features wooden construction barriers, street benches, and vending machines. The camera follows a pedestrian down the narrow commercial street filled with cyberpunk signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that ascends from a gritty industrial lower level into the neon-drenched commercial heights of a dystopian city. It begins on a narrow concrete walkway flanked by blue vending machines and red plastic chairs, moving toward distant smokestacks under a dusk sky. As the camera climbs a set of concrete stairs, the environment shifts to an upper level of corrugated metal shacks and metal grating, eventually opening onto a wooden path that reveals a panoramic view of the Night City skyline and its glowing holograms. The scene then turns inward, ascending a long staircase past red tiled walls and green dumpsters toward a pink neon hotel sign. Finally, the camera emerges onto a crowded upper street level, navigating past wooden construction barriers and dense storefront signage while following a pedestrian through the vibrant commercial district.
